requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign — Seasonal Space Heating Energy Efficiency (ηs) Requirements (GB)
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计——季节性空间供暖能效（ηs）要求（大不列颠）
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計——季節性空間供暖能效（ηs）要求（大不列顛）

summary.en: The Ecodesign for Energy-Related Products and Energy Information Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/745) is the GB-retained successor to EU Ecodesign Directive 2009/125/EC and the implementing measures under it, including Commission Regulation (EU) No 813/2013 for space heaters and combination heaters. Air-source heat pumps used for space heating are covered as heat pump space heaters. The key metric is seasonal space heating energy efficiency (ηs), which must meet minimum thresholds. Under the retained Regulation 813/2013 as adopted into UK law, the minimum seasonal coefficient of performance (SCOP) thresholds apply per climate zone (average, warmer, colder). Manufacturers must not place products on the GB market that fall below the minimum ηs requirements. Testing must be conducted to EN 14511 (performance at rated conditions) and EN 14825 (part-load performance for seasonal metrics). Note: exact ηs threshold values in the UK retained legislation should be verified directly against SI 2021/745 and associated schedules, as the numerical thresholds carry legal weight and may differ from EU figures post-amendment.
summary.zh: 《2021年能源相关产品生态设计及能源信息法规》（SI 2021/745）是英国留存的法规，为欧盟生态设计指令2009/125/EC及其下实施措施（包括欧盟委员会法规(EU) No 813/2013，适用于空间加热器和组合加热器）的继承法规。用于空间供暖的空气源热泵以热泵空间供暖器形式涵盖在内。关键指标为季节性空间供暖能效（ηs），须满足最低阈值。依据纳入英国法律的留存法规813/2013，最低季节性性能系数（SCOP）阈值按气候区（平均、较暖、较冷）适用。制造商不得将低于最低ηs要求的产品投放大不列颠市场。测试须按EN 14511（额定工况下性能）和EN 14825（季节指标的部分负荷性能）进行。注：英国留存法规中的具体ηs阈值应直接对照SI 2021/745及相关附表核实，因数值阈值具有法律效力，修订后可能与欧盟数值不同。
summary.zht: 《2021年能源相關產品生態設計及能源資訊法規》（SI 2021/745）是英國留存的法規，為歐盟生態設計指令2009/125/EC及其下實施措施（包括歐盟委員會法規(EU) No 813/2013，適用於空間加熱器和組合加熱器）的繼承法規。用於空間供暖的空氣源熱泵以熱泵空間供暖器形式涵蓋在內。關鍵指標為季節性空間供暖能效（ηs），須滿足最低閾值。依據納入英國法律的留存法規813/2013，最低季節性性能係數（SCOP）閾值按氣候區（平均、較暖、較冷）適用。製造商不得將低於最低ηs要求的產品投放大不列顛市場。測試須按EN 14511（額定工況下性能）和EN 14825（季節指標的部分負荷性能）進行。注：英國留存法規中的具體ηs閾值應直接對照SI 2021/745及相關附表核實，因數值閾值具有法律效力，修訂後可能與歐盟數值不同。

standards_or_laws: The Ecodesign for Energy-Related Products and Energy Information Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/745)
EN 14511:2018 — Air conditioners, liquid chilling packages and heat pumps for space heating and cooling (performance testing)
EN 14825:2018 — Air conditioners, liquid chilling packages and heat pumps (part-load / seasonal performance)

summary.en: China's primary energy efficiency standard for air-source heat pumps used as room air conditioners or heating equipment is GB 21455-2019 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners), which sets minimum energy efficiency ratio (EER) and coefficient of performance (COP) at rated conditions, not seasonal metrics. For low-ambient heat pump water heaters, GB/T 25127-2020 (Low ambient temperature air source heat pump water heater for household and similar use) covers performance under low-temperature conditions. China does not use the ηs/SCOP seasonal metric framework; Chinese test conditions and metrics are not directly comparable to EN 14511 / EN 14825 results used for UK Ecodesign compliance.
summary.zh: 中国针对用作房间空调器或供暖设备的空气源热泵的主要能效标准是GB 21455-2019（房间空气调节器能效限定值及能效等级），该标准规定额定工况下的最低能效比（EER）和性能系数（COP），而非季节性指标。对于低环境温度热泵热水机，GB/T 25127-2020（家用及类似用途低环境温度空气源热泵热水机）涵盖低温工况下的性能。中国不采用ηs/SCOP季节性指标框架；中国测试条件和指标与用于英国生态设计合规的EN 14511 / EN 14825结果不可直接比较。
summary.zht: 中國針對用作房間空調器或供暖設備的空氣源熱泵的主要能效標準是GB 21455-2019（房間空氣調節器能效限定值及能效等級），該標準規定額定工況下的最低能效比（EER）和性能係數（COP），而非季節性指標。對於低環境溫度熱泵熱水機，GB/T 25127-2020（家用及類似用途低環境溫度空氣源熱泵熱水機）涵蓋低溫工況下的性能。中國不採用ηs/SCOP季節性指標框架；中國測試條件和指標與用於英國生態設計合規的EN 14511 / EN 14825結果不可直接比較。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455-2019 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for room air conditioners (SAMR/SAC)
GB/T 25127-2020 — Low ambient temperature air source heat pump water heater for household and similar use (SAC)
GB/T 7725-2022 — Room air conditioners — performance test (SAC)

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must obtain EN 14511 and EN 14825 test results from an accredited laboratory to demonstrate ηs compliance with SI 2021/745. Existing GB 21455 or GB/T 25127 test reports cannot substitute for EN 14511/EN 14825 results because the test conditions, reference climate data, and seasonal calculation methodologies differ. Exporters must also verify that their specific product's declared ηs value meets the applicable minimum threshold under the UK retained regulation for the product category and climate zone. Product data sheets and technical documentation must state ηs values and reference the applicable UK legislation.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须通过认可实验室获取EN 14511和EN 14825测试结果，以证明符合SI 2021/745的ηs要求。现有的GB 21455或GB/T 25127测试报告不能替代EN 14511/EN 14825结果，因为测试条件、参考气候数据和季节性计算方法存在差异。出口商还须核实其特定产品的申报ηs值是否达到英国留存法规针对该产品类别和气候区规定的适用最低阈值。产品数据表和技术文件须注明ηs值并引用适用的英国法规。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須通過認可實驗室獲取EN 14511和EN 14825測試結果，以證明符合SI 2021/745的ηs要求。現有的GB 21455或GB/T 25127測試報告不能替代EN 14511/EN 14825結果，因為測試條件、參考氣候數據和季節性計算方法存在差異。出口商還須核實其特定產品的申報ηs值是否達到英國留存法規針對該產品類別和氣候區規定的適用最低閾值。產品數據表和技術文件須注明ηs值並引用適用的英國法規。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecodesign minimum ηs/SCOP requirements under SI 2021/745 are mandatory for space heating heat pumps placed on the GB market. Chinese GB 21455 or GB/T 25127 certificates do not satisfy this requirement; EN 14511 and EN 14825 testing is required. Verify current ηs threshold values directly against SI 2021/745 schedules before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据SI 2021/745，生态设计最低ηs/SCOP要求对投放大不列颠市场的空间供暖热泵具有强制约束力。中国GB 21455或GB/T 25127证书不满足此要求；须进行EN 14511和EN 14825测试。在投放市场前，请直接对照SI 2021/745附表核实当前ηs阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據SI 2021/745，生態設計最低ηs/SCOP要求對投放大不列顛市場的空間供暖熱泵具有強制約束力。中國GB 21455或GB/T 25127證書不滿足此要求；須進行EN 14511和EN 14825測試。在投放市場前，請直接對照SI 2021/745附表核實當前ηs閾值。

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk / King's Printer of Acts of Parliament

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — A+++ to G Scale for Space Heaters (GB)
requirement_topic.zh: 能源标签——空间加热器A+++至G评级（大不列颠）
requirement_topic.zht: 能源標籤——空間加熱器A+++至G評級（大不列顛）

summary.en: The Energy Information Regulations 2021 (SI 2021/1095) is the GB-retained framework for energy labelling of energy-related products, including space heating heat pumps. Under this framework, heat pump space heaters must display an EU-style A+++ to G energy label based on the seasonal space heating energy efficiency (ηs) values derived from EN 14825 testing. The label must be affixed to or shown with the product at point of sale (including online). Dealers must display labels; manufacturers and importers must ensure labels are provided with products. The label format for space heaters uses a scale of A+++ to D for the average climate season (the highest bands for heat pumps given their high ηs values). The labelling obligation is linked to the Ecodesign requirement — a product meeting the minimum ηs threshold must also carry the correct energy label.
summary.zh: 《2021年能源信息法规》（SI 2021/1095）是英国留存的能源相关产品（包括空间供暖热泵）能源标签框架。依据该框架，热泵空间供暖器须根据EN 14825测试得出的季节性空间供暖能效（ηs）值展示欧盟式A+++至G能源标签。标签须在销售时（包括线上）贴附于产品上或随产品展示。经销商须展示标签；制造商和进口商须确保随产品提供标签。空间加热器的标签格式采用平均气候季节A+++至D的评级（热泵因ηs值较高，通常处于较高评级）。标签义务与生态设计要求相关联——满足最低ηs阈值的产品还须贴附正确的能源标签。
summary.zht: 《2021年能源資訊法規》（SI 2021/1095）是英國留存的能源相關產品（包括空間供暖熱泵）能源標籤框架。依據該框架，熱泵空間供暖器須根據EN 14825測試得出的季節性空間供暖能效（ηs）值展示歐盟式A+++至G能源標籤。標籤須在銷售時（包括線上）貼附於產品上或隨產品展示。經銷商須展示標籤；製造商和進口商須確保隨產品提供標籤。空間加熱器的標籤格式採用平均氣候季節A+++至D的評級（熱泵因ηs值較高，通常處於較高評級）。標籤義務與生態設計要求相關聯——滿足最低ηs閾值的產品還須貼附正確的能源標籤。

standards_or_laws: EN 14825:2018 — Part-load / seasonal performance (basis for label class calculation)

summary.en: China has an energy labelling system under the China Energy Label (中国能效标识) scheme, administered by NDRC and SAMR. For room air conditioners, energy efficiency grades 1–5 under GB 21455-2019 are used (Grade 1 being most efficient). However, the Chinese A-to-G or A+++ scale does not exist; the Grade 1–5 system is not equivalent to the UK/EU A+++ to G label. Product energy labels in China use a different graphical format (horizontal bar with 1–5 grades). Chinese energy label documentation cannot substitute for UK energy labelling obligations under SI 2021/1095.
summary.zh: 中国通过中国能效标识方案（由国家发展和改革委员会和国家市场监督管理总局管理）建立了能源标签制度。对于房间空调器，适用GB 21455-2019下的1至5级能效等级（1级最高效）。但中国不存在A至G或A+++评级；1至5级制度不等同于英国/欧盟A+++至G标签。中国产品能源标签采用不同的图形格式（带1至5级的横条）。中国能源标签文件不能替代SI 2021/1095下的英国能源标签义务。
summary.zht: 中國通過中國能效標識方案（由國家發展和改革委員會和國家市場監督管理總局管理）建立了能源標籤制度。對於房間空調器，適用GB 21455-2019下的1至5級能效等級（1級最高效）。但中國不存在A至G或A+++評級；1至5級制度不等同於英國/歐盟A+++至G標籤。中國產品能源標籤採用不同的圖形格式（帶1至5級的橫條）。中國能源標籤文件不能替代SI 2021/1095下的英國能源標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: GB 21455-2019 — Energy efficiency grades 1–5 for room air conditioners (basis for China Energy Label)
China Energy Label (中国能效标识) scheme — NDRC/SAMR administered

gap.en: Chinese exporters must generate UK-compliant energy labels (A+++ to G scale) based on EN 14825 test data. Existing Chinese energy label documentation (Grade 1–5 format) cannot substitute. The label calculation and graphic format must follow the SI 2021/1095 requirements. Labels must be provided in English. This requires separate UK label artwork and correct seasonal efficiency class assignment before products reach UK dealers.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须根据EN 14825测试数据生成符合英国要求的能源标签（A+++至G评级）。现有的中国能源标签文件（1至5级格式）不可替代。标签计算和图形格式须遵循SI 2021/1095要求。标签须以英文提供。这要求在产品到达英国经销商之前，另行制作英国标签图稿并正确分配季节性能效等级。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須根據EN 14825測試數據生成符合英國要求的能源標籤（A+++至G評級）。現有的中國能源標籤文件（1至5級格式）不可替代。標籤計算和圖形格式須遵循SI 2021/1095要求。標籤須以英文提供。這要求在產品到達英國經銷商之前，另行製作英國標籤圖稿並正確分配季節性能效等級。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UK energy labelling under SI 2021/1095 is mandatory for space heating heat pumps sold in GB. Chinese Grade 1–5 energy labels are not substitutes. EN 14825 seasonal efficiency data must be used to calculate and display the correct UK A+++ to G label class before products are placed on the GB market.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】依据SI 2021/1095，在大不列颠销售的空间供暖热泵须强制执行英国能源标签要求。中国1至5级能源标签不可替代。在将产品投放大不列颠市场前，须使用EN 14825季节性能效数据计算并展示正确的英国A+++至G标签等级。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】依據SI 2021/1095，在大不列顛銷售的空間供暖熱泵須強制執行英國能源標籤要求。中國1至5級能源標籤不可替代。在將產品投放大不列顛市場前，須使用EN 14825季節性能效數據計算並展示正確的英國A+++至G標籤等級。

source.publisher: legislation.gov.uk / King's Printer of Acts of Parliament
